I've now tried clicking on the blue circle multiple times (including on different parts of it and far outside the object), white cross, purple square at bottom left multiple times (including on different parts of it and far outside the object), purple square at top multiple times, and ACTION7 sixteen times. EFFICIENCY BUDGET — your score on each level is (baseline_actions / your_actions)^2, so every wasted action costs you quadratically.
Level 1: you have used 50 actions; a strong score needs about 22 or fewer. You are 2.3x over the target.
STALL: the board has not changed for your last 25 actions on this level — those actions had no visible effect. Stop repeating the same move; try a different action or target.
